description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with raglan sleeves up to the elbow, native girl in graphic print and sequins on the front, branding appliquéd on the left curved hemFitRegularWash careHand wash inside out with like colours in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach, soak, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanMild iron; Do not iron on decorationsIndulge your native side with this blue tee from wrangler. The graphic print of the native girl inspires the freedom of life with a bit of mystery, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable in all seasons. Team this with dark denims and canvas shoes for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26"
